mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.store_id, p.product_group_id, pg.name as "productGroupName", p.name, p.description, p.image_url, p.price, p.status, p.stock, p.max_order_quantity, p.sort_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM p_product p LEFT JOIN p_product_group pg ON p.product_group_id = pg.id AND pg.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE p.store_id = #{storeId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.store_id, p.product_group_id, pg.name as "productGroupName", p.name, p.description, p.image_url, p.price, p.status, p.stock, p.max_order_quantity, p.sort_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM p_product p LEFT JOIN p_product_group pg ON p.product_group_id = pg.id AND pg.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE p.id = #{productId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
